title: Fidacy decision-provenance receipt claims (fidacy.artifact.v1)
description: Payload claims of the compact JWS (typ fidacy-artifact-receipt+jws, alg EdDSA) that attests a decision record existed with exactly these bytes at this moment. The JWS is the source of truth; verify against the issuer JWKS by the protected-header kid.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the decision-record bytes. The record itself is never uploaded.

seq.description: Position in the issuer's hash-chained audit; resolves to a Bitcoin-anchored Merkle checkpoint.

hash.description: The chain entry's hash (commits to every prior entry).

digest.description: The audit-leaf digest the chain entry commits to.
